title: 谋杀启事
summary:
Colonel Eastbrook and his wife, Laura, discuss a notice in the newspaper regarding an event organized by Miss Blacklock. While the Colonel initially dismisses the invitation as ridiculous and unnecessary, Laura persuades him to attend out of a sense of community spirit and a desire to help Miss Blacklock with police procedure.

At the Gravel Pit House, where Miss Chinchy and Miss Muggleton reside in joined cottages, Miss Muggleton reads a bizarre advertisement from the *Chipping Cleghorn Gazette*. The notice states that a murder will take place on Friday, October 29th, at 6:30 PM at the Little Hall, and requests that friends attend without further notice. Miss Chinchy, who is busy preparing a meal of boiled potato skins and cabbage in the hen house, remains largely indifferent to the mystery.

Meanwhile, Mrs. Harmon (nicknamed "Roundabout") excitedly informs her husband, the Reverend Julian Harmon, about Miss Blacklock's announcement of a murder. She notes the advertisement is placed between classified ads for pianos and false teeth and speculates that the Simmons siblings may have influenced Miss Blacklock. Mrs. Harmon expresses a fear of playing games in the dark but remains cheerful. As they dine, the couple discusses the merits of living in a large, drafty house. The passage concludes with Reverend Harmon telling his wife the story of an old pastor named Skrinker.
